title: Workshop: Build an Accessible Responder Knowledge Check
summary: Workshop: Build an Accessible Responder Knowledge Check retrieves prior skills in an original multi-state training quiz across zoom preferences and touch scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css zoom reflow, css visible hidden content, css focus visibility, css user preferences, css touch targets, css accessibility regression in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real multi-state training quiz across zoom preferences and touch artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.
